title: cast to interval causes crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id Int32, duration Int32, description String);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, duration, description) VALUES (1, 31536000, 'One year interval');
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, duration, description) VALUES (2, NULL, 'Null interval');
SELECT id, duration FROM test_intervals WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: casting string to interval type causes crash
